Jamadagni, I think we're getting a bit stuck here. As your interviewer, I want to help you showcase your skills and knowledge, but we need to make progress on the questions. Let's try to refocus, okay?

We've got a great opportunity to practice and learn here. Shall we try to answer the previous question about regularization in machine learning?

If you're feeling stuck, I can offer a hint or provide more context to help you out. Just let me know!
